import json, pathlib, re
files=[]
for date in ['2026/03/25','2026/03/24']:
    p=pathlib.Path('articles')/date/'articles.jsonl'
    if p.exists(): files.append(p)
queries={
'ENG_defender':['Uruguay','Wembley','Harry Maguire','John Stones','Marc Guehi','England defender','stoppage-time penalty'],
'Israel_footballer':['Menashe Zalka','Menashe Zalqa','Israeli Premier League footballer','opening fire','southern Lebanon footballer','IDF reservist footballer'],
'Iran_city':['three residential houses','six people killed','six killed','residential houses','Dezful','Andimeshk','Isfahan','Minab'],
'Paris_app':['Paris bank bombing','attempted bank bombing','recruit him','recruited via Telegram','Telegram','Signal'],
'AbuDhabi_company':['ADNOC','significant damage','Abu Dhabi','Ruwais','Borouge','Emirates Global Aluminium','TAQA'],
'Leb_journalists':['three Lebanese journalists','Lebanese journalists','Hasbaya','Alma al-Shaab','Khiam','journalists killed'],
'Jerusalem_worship':['for all religions','worship for all religions','Palm Sunday','Jerusalem access','access dispute'],
'Gulf_plant':['power and water plant','fresh water','desalination','worker killed','Saudi Arabia','Bahrain'],
'Sudan_aid':['aid disruption','thousands cut off','North Kordofan','North Darfur','South Kordofan','Blue Nile','White Nile'],
'armed_group':['Dimona','Arad','southern Israeli city','launched attacks','IRGC','Revolutionary Guards','Houthis']
}
for label, terms in queries.items():
    print('\n###',label)
    hits=[]
    for p in files:
        with p.open(errors='ignore') as f:
            for ln,line in enumerate(f,1):
                try:a=json.loads(line)
                except: continue
                title=str(a.get('title') or '')
                content=str(a.get('content') or '')
                txt=(title+'\n'+content).lower()
                matched=[t for t in terms if t.lower() in txt]
                if matched:
                    score=len(matched)
                    if score>=2 or any(t.lower() in ['three residential houses','paris bank bombing','attempted bank bombing','israeli premier league footballer','three lebanese journalists','for all religions','power and water plant','aid disruption','southern israeli city'] for t in matched):
                        hits.append((score, p.as_posix(), a.get('date_publish'), a.get('source'), title, matched, content))
    hits=sorted(hits, key=lambda x:(-x[0], str(x[2])), reverse=False)[:12]
    if not hits:
        print('none')
        continue
    seen=set()
    out=0
    for score,p,date,src,title,matched,content in hits:
        key=(date,src,title)
        if key in seen: continue
        seen.add(key); out+=1
        flat=content.replace('\n',' ')
        # center around first matched term in content/title
        idx=-1
        for t in matched:
            i=flat.lower().find(t.lower())
            if i>=0: idx=i; break
        if idx<0: idx=0
        print(f'- {date} {src} {title} matched={matched}')
        print(flat[max(0,idx-220):idx+460])
        if out>=6: break
